title: Drawbridge
description: A retractable bridge made of sticky pistons that extends or retracts a floor of blocks over a gap. When closed, players can walk across; when open the blocks retract into the wall leaving an impassable moat. Uses a line of sticky pistons on each side of the gap, triggered by a lever or T flip-flop. Typically 3-5 blocks wide with pistons embedded in the walls. Double-piston extenders required for bridges over 2 blocks deep. Often combined with a portcullis (vertical iron bars) for a complete gate effect.
